log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Air Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+6=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Air Genasi — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 30 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Air Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+6=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Air Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Air Genasi — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Air Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Air Genasi — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Air Genasi — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 29 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
